title: Quick Cure (Fabric)
description: Instantly cure zombie villagers (now for fabric!)
body:
This is a lightweight mod that removes the long waiting period for curing zombie villagers. By default, the transformation happens instantaneously but can be configured with the `/quickcure` command.

![conversion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d92619994955f589a1b0ffc42c8687c382312ab.gif)

## Example Commands

`/quickcure 0`: Removes the delay (Default)

`/quickcure 20`: Sets the delay to 20 game ticks

`/quickcure 130`: Sets the delay to 130 game ticks


## Holy Moly
